sets.name: NewJeans Super Shy
sets.hook_title_tw: 瘦了之後朋友都認不出來
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s both hands on cheeks making shy/embarrassed 'cheek-cupping' pose, 3-6s lower hands, cute side-to-side small steps, 6-10s point both index fingers at camera with playful smile
sets.v23_before: arms relaxed hanging at sides, tiny shy head tilt, very small rhythm sway, NO dancing, NO arm raising, embarrassed subdued vibe, ends with arms still at sides neutral standing
sets.v23_after: starts with arms at sides in neutral, then bursts into NewJeans-style cute pop dance: hands flutter to cheeks shyly then open outward, cute side-to-side hop steps, finger hearts thrown at camera, confident happy vibe

sets.name: Apple Challenge (Meduza)
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s right hand on top of head like balancing an apple, left hand on hip, 3-6s switch hands, 6-10s both arms cross in front of chest in X shape then open wide
sets.v23_before: arms hanging at sides, small shoulder shrugs to the beat, subtle head nods, NO choreography, NO hand raising, shy intro vibe, ends arms-at-sides neutral
sets.v23_after: immediately starts the viral TikTok 'Apple dance': right hand taps top of head, left hand on opposite hip, then swaps sides in rhythm, then arms cross in front of chest, then side steps with hip sway, energetic trending vibe

sets.name: aespa Supernova Chacha
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s finger-heart made above head with both hands, 3-6s cute chacha hip-shake left-right twice, 6-10s one hand on waist, other hand makes a small wink gesture at camera
sets.v23_before: arms relaxed, small rhythmic hip sway only, no arms up, no footwork, neutral look, ends with arms hanging
sets.v23_after: starts neutral then immediately performs K-pop aespa-style chacha choreography: sharp hip chachacha with both hands slicing air outward, arm slice across chest, confident sharp pose turn, K-pop power vibe

sets.name: Hot To Go (Chappell Roan)
sets.hook_title_tw: 照鏡子連我自己都嚇到
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence of forming letters with body: 0-2.5s both arms straight up in V shape making 'H', 2.5-5s arms form circle above head making 'O', 5-7.5s one arm horizontal + one vertical making 'T', 7.5-10s both arms open wide making 'G'
sets.v23_before: arms at sides, tiny weight shift between feet, embarrassed shy vibe, absolutely no arm raising, ends neutral standing
sets.v23_after: starts from neutral then explodes into the viral 'Hot To Go' letter choreography: arms up for H, round O above head, crossed T, open-wide G, big confident energy with hip pops between letters

sets.name: Confident Flex (Bbl Drizzy)
sets.hook_title_tw: 這位姐姐本來不是這樣的
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s right hand fanning self playfully like cooling off, 3-6s both thumbs up proudly, 6-10s one hand on hip other hand twirling hair with sassy expression
sets.v23_before: arms relaxed, shoulder roll every beat but no arms raising, subdued reluctant vibe, ends arms-at-sides neutral
sets.v23_after: starts neutral then bursts into sassy confident freestyle: shoulder shimmies, hip pops left-right, arm pumps above head, hair flip, finger point at camera with a confident 'I told you' smirk, celebratory flex vibe

sets.name: Jiggle Jiggle (Duffer Brothers)
sets.hook_title_tw: 被拒絕相親後下定決心的成果
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s both hands at waist level doing small jiggle side-to-side motion, 3-6s point both index fingers forward rhythmically, 6-10s hands on hips with playful head bobs
sets.v23_before: arms relaxed, minimal weight shift, small shoulder bounce to beat, NO big moves, ends at sides
sets.v23_after: starts neutral then explodes into iconic Jiggle Jiggle dance: rhythmic hand jiggles at waist, fun shoulder bounces, playful finger gun poses, big smile energy

sets.name: ITZY Midzy Flick
sets.hook_title_tw: 減了45公斤我自己都不敢信
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s right arm whipping from shoulder to opposite hip in flick motion, 3-6s left arm does the same, 6-10s both arms cross in front then fly open to V pose
sets.v23_before: arms at sides, slight body sway only, subdued vibe, ends neutral
sets.v23_after: bursts into ITZY-style K-pop flick choreography: sharp arm whips, quick pivots, crisp footwork, final power pose with pointed finger, intense idol energy

sets.name: Oh Nanana
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s both hands up slow wave like ocean motion, 3-6s hip circle clockwise twice, 6-10s one arm behind head like model pose, other hand on waist
sets.v23_before: arms relaxed, small hip sway only, reserved vibe, ends at sides
sets.v23_after: bursts into Oh Nanana dance: rolling hips, smooth arm waves, body rolls, sultry final pose hand brushing hair, confident dancer vibe

sets.name: Runway Model Walk
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s tilt head confidently with hands on hips, 3-6s shift weight dramatically to one leg, 6-10s slow 90-degree turn left then back, looking over shoulder
sets.v23_before: arms at sides, slight swaying only, shy stance, ends neutral
sets.v23_after: starts neutral then performs a fashion runway model strut in place: dramatic weight shifts, hair flip, cat walk turn, final fierce pose with pout, high-fashion energy

sets.name: Crazy In Love Body Roll
sets.v1_motion: 10s sequence: 0-3s both hands behind head with hip sway, 3-6s slow full body roll from shoulders to hips, 6-10s sassy snap with fingers, hand on hip
sets.v23_before: arms at sides, small bounce to beat, shy vibe, ends neutral
sets.v23_after: bursts into Beyonce-style body roll routine: full body waves, fierce hip movements, hair whip, snap poses, queen vibe

outfit_before: loose oversized gray t-shirt and baggy black shorts
outfit_after: fitted beige crop top and denim hot shorts
